title: Change Column to a Template Managed Column
excerpt: Would be great to be able to swap a current status column in your boards to be a template managed column instead. We have all these boards with the exact same column with drop downs with automations built on them. But to…

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to be able to swap a current status column in your boards to be a template managed column instead. We have all these boards with the exact same column with drop downs with automations built on them. But to implement this great feature we have to delete that column and add the managed one then relink all statuses. Just a great thought that would help with this implementation of managed columns released: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tkPHPJSZV5c&lc=UgwVYapTUVQOShVK5Ld4AaABAg.AJ-mYyUSVSdAJ9lHWwsGuZ
